   <xs:group name="OrientationGroup">     <xs:group name="OrientationGroup"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Represents the direction in which an entity is oriented; typically the direction it is facing. Where this class is used, C2SIM Coalitions must state whether they require values for both EulerAngles, Heading, or both. In the absence of specification both are required.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Represents the direction in which an entity is oriented; typically the direction it is facing. Where this class is used, C2SIM Coalitions must state whether they require values for both EulerAngles, Heading, or both. In the absence of specification both are required.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Orientation</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Orientation</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="HeadingAngle" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="HeadingAngle" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:group>     </xs:group> 
   <xs:complexType name="OrientationType">     <xs:complexType name="OrientationType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Represents the direction in which an entity is oriented; typically the direction it is facing. Where this class is used, C2SIM Coalitions must state whether they require values for both EulerAngles, Heading, or both. In the absence of specification both are required.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Represents the direction in which an entity is oriented; typically the direction it is facing. Where this class is used, C2SIM Coalitions must state whether they require values for both EulerAngles, Heading, or both. In the absence of specification both are required.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Orientation</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Orientation</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:choice>        <xs:choice> 
         <xs:element ref="EulerAngles"/>           <xs:element ref="EulerAngles"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Heading"/>           <xs:element ref="Heading"/> 
      </xs:choice>        </xs:choice> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:complexType name="OverlayType">     <xs:complexType name="OverlayType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>A logical grouping of Entities (units, graphics, etc.) for purposes of conveniently referring to them.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>A logical grouping of Entities (units, graphics, etc.) for purposes of conveniently referring to them.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Overlay</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Overlay</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:group ref="AbstractObjectGroup"/>           <xs:group ref="AbstractObjectGroup"/> 
         <xs:element ref="EntityReference" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>           <xs:element ref="EntityReference" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType>

   <xs:complexType name="PausePlaybackType">     <xs:complexType name="PausePlaybackType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for pausing the playback of recorded C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording being played back is not needed here since there can be only one playback in progress at a time.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for pausing the playback of recorded C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording being played back is not needed here since there can be only one playback in progress at a time.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PausePlayback</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PausePlayback</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="PausePlayback" type="PausePlaybackType"/>     <xs:element name="PausePlayback" type="PausePlaybackType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="PauseRecordingType">     <xs:complexType name="PauseRecordingType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for pausing the recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording in progress is not needed here since there can be only one recording in progress at a time.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for pausing the recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording in progress is not needed here since there can be only one recording in progress at a time.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PauseRecording</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PauseRecording</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="PauseRecording" type="PauseRecordingType"/>     <xs:element name="PauseRecording" type="PauseRecordingType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="PauseScenarioType">     <xs:complexType name="PauseScenarioType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>A system command to pause the execution of a scenario across a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>A system command to pause the execution of a scenario across a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PauseScenario</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PauseScenario</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="PauseScenario" type="PauseScenarioType"/>     <xs:element name="PauseScenario" type="PauseScenarioType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="PersonType">     <xs:complexType name="PersonType">

   <xs:complexType name="PhysicalConceptType">     <xs:complexType name="PhysicalConceptType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Concepts relating to the physical characteristics of an entity (e.g., location, health, orientation, size, etc.). The subclasses of this class have complex or alternative representations, and so are classes. Other physical properties such as mass that are simple scalars can be data type properties of (ConcreteEntity) objects.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Concepts relating to the physical characteristics of an entity (e.g., location, health, orientation, size, etc.). The subclasses of this class have complex or alternative representations, and so are classes. Other physical properties such as mass that are simple scalars can be data type properties of (ConcreteEntity) objects.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PhysicalConcept</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PhysicalConcept</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:choice>        <xs:choice> 
         <xs:element ref="EntityHealthStatus"/>           <xs:element ref="EntityHealthStatus"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Location"/>           <xs:element ref="Location"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Orientation"/>           <xs:element ref="Orientation"/> 
         <xs:element ref="SpatialOffset"/>           <xs:element ref="SpatialOffset"/> 
         <xs:element ref="TemporalConcept"/>           <xs:element ref="TemporalConcept"/> 
      </xs:choice>        </xs:choice> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="PhysicalConcept" type="PhysicalConceptType"/>     <xs:element name="PhysicalConcept" type="PhysicalConceptType"/> 
   <xs:group name="PhysicalEntityGroup">     <xs:group name="PhysicalEntityGroup"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation>

         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PhysicalEntity</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PhysicalEntity</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="CurrentState" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="CurrentState" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Marking" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Marking" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:group>     </xs:group>

      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>An Entity that has physical/kinematic properties.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>An Entity that has physical/kinematic properties.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PhysicalEntity</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PhysicalEntity</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation>

   <xs:element name="PhysicalEntity" type="PhysicalEntityType"/>     <xs:element name="PhysicalEntity" type="PhysicalEntityType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="PhysicalStateType">     <xs:complexType name="PhysicalStateType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Description of the physical state of an entity, including location, orientation, health, speed, etc.          <xs:documentation>Description of the physical state of an entity, including location, orientation, health, speed, etc.
Note that an EnvironmentalState class should be a subclass of PhysicalState. The EnvironmentalState could be the state of, for example, a smoke plume, which would have a location and could have direction, orientation, and speed.</xs:documentation>  Note that an EnvironmentalState class should be a subclass of PhysicalState. The EnvironmentalState could be the state of, for example, a smoke plume, which would have a location and could have direction, orientation, and speed.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PhysicalState</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PhysicalState</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:group ref="EntityStateGroup"/>           <xs:group ref="EntityStateGroup"/> 
         <xs:element ref="DirectionOfMovement" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="DirectionOfMovement" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="EntityHealthStatus" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>           <xs:element ref="EntityHealthStatus" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Location" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>           <xs:element ref="Location" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Orientation" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Orientation" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Speed" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Speed" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="PhysicalState" type="PhysicalStateType"/>     <xs:element name="PhysicalState" type="PhysicalStateType"/> 
   <xs:group name="PlatformGroup">     <xs:group name="PlatformGroup"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>An Entity that consists of an identifiable type physical equipment and/or software.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>An Entity that consists of an identifiable type physical equipment and/or software.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Platform</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Platform</xs:documentation>

      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence>

   </xs:group>     </xs:group>

      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation>

         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Platform</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Platform</xs:documentation>

         <xs:element ref="Vehicle"/>           <xs:element ref="Vehicle"/>

   <xs:complexType name="PlaybackRealtimeMultipleReportType">     <xs:complexType name="PlaybackRealtimeMultipleReportType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for reporting the current setting of the playbackRealtimeMultiple value indicating the multiple of simulation time to realtime currently set for the playback of recorded messages in the C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for reporting the current setting of the playbackRealtimeMultiple value indicating the multiple of simulation time to realtime currently set for the playback of recorded messages in the C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PlaybackRealtimeMultipleReport</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PlaybackRealtimeMultipleReport</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="PlaybackRealtimeMultipleReport"     <xs:element name="PlaybackRealtimeMultipleReport" 
               type="PlaybackRealtimeMultipleReportType"/>                 type="PlaybackRealtimeMultipleReportType"/> 
   <xs:simpleType name="PlaybackStatusCodeType">     <xs:simpleType name="PlaybackStatusCodeType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Enumeration of states of the playback of recorded messages.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Enumeration of states of the playback of recorded messages.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PlaybackStatusCode</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PlaybackStatusCode</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:restriction base="xs:string">        <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> 
         <xs:enumeration value="NO_PLAYBACK_IN_PROGRESS"/>           <xs:enumeration value="NO_PLAYBACK_IN_PROGRESS"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="PLAYBACK_PAUSED"/>           <xs:enumeration value="PLAYBACK_PAUSED"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="PLAYBACK_RUNNING"/>           <xs:enumeration value="PLAYBACK_RUNNING"/> 
      </xs:restriction>        </xs:restriction> 
   </xs:simpleType>     </xs:simpleType> 
   <xs:complexType name="PlaybackStatusReportType">     <xs:complexType name="PlaybackStatusReportType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for reporting the status of the playback of recorded C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name refers to the name of the recording being played back at the time of this report. Playback position may be  something like sequence number in the recording file. The format and the meaning of the string value is out of the scope of the C2SIM standard, and should be defined at the Federation level (interoperability across different Federations is not guaranteed). The time since playback start gives the time duration (isoTimeDurationBase) since the start time of the current playback (i.e., the message timestamp that the playback has reached). The playbackRealtimeMultiple is the current setting of the rate at which recorded messages are being played back.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for reporting the status of the playback of recorded C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name refers to the name of the recording being played back at the time of this report. Playback position may be  something like sequence number in the recording file. The format and the meaning of the string value is out of the scope of the C2SIM standard, and should be defined at the Federation level (interoperability across different Federations is not guaranteed). The time since playback start gives the time duration (isoTimeDurationBase) since the start time of the current playback (i.e., the message timestamp that the playback has reached). The playbackRealtimeMultiple is the current setting of the rate at which recorded messages are being played back.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PlaybackStatusReport</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PlaybackStatusReport</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="Name" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Name" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="PlaybackPosition" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="PlaybackPosition" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="PlaybackRealtimeMultiple" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="PlaybackRealtimeMultiple" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="PlaybackStatusCode" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="PlaybackStatusCode" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="TimeSincePlaybackStart" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="TimeSincePlaybackStart" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="PlaybackStatusReport" type="PlaybackStatusReportType"/>     <xs:element name="PlaybackStatusReport" type="PlaybackStatusReportType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="PositionReportContentType">     <xs:complexType name="PositionReportContentType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>The content of a report that is used primarily to convey the position of an entity.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>The content of a report that is used primarily to convey the position of an entity.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PositionReportContent</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#PositionReportContent</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:group ref="ReportContentGroup"/>           <xs:group ref="ReportContentGroup"/> 
         <xs:element ref="EntityHealthStatus" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>           <xs:element ref="EntityHealthStatus" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> 
         <xs:element ref="HeadingAngle" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="HeadingAngle" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Location" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Location" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Speed" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Speed" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="SubjectEntity" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="SubjectEntity" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="PositionReportContent" type="PositionReportContentType"/>     <xs:element name="PositionReportContent" type="PositionReportContentType"/> 
   <xs:simpleType name="RecordingStatusCodeType">     <xs:simpleType name="RecordingStatusCodeType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Enumeration of states of the recording of messages sent during execution of a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Enumeration of states of the recording of messages sent during execution of a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RecordingStatusCode</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RecordingStatusCode</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:restriction base="xs:string">        <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> 
         <xs:enumeration value="NOT_RECORDING"/>           <xs:enumeration value="NOT_RECORDING"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="RECORDING_IN_PROGRESS"/>           <xs:enumeration value="RECORDING_IN_PROGRESS"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="RECORDING_PAUSED"/>           <xs:enumeration value="RECORDING_PAUSED"/> 
      </xs:restriction>        </xs:restriction> 
   </xs:simpleType>     </xs:simpleType> 
   <xs:complexType name="RecordingStatusReportType">     <xs:complexType name="RecordingStatusReportType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for reporting the status of the recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name refers to the name given to this recording. The file size is the size of the recording file in bytes (could be a "current" file size if a recording is in progress at the time of this report).</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for reporting the status of the recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name refers to the name given to this recording. The file size is the size of the recording file in bytes (could be a "current" file size if a recording is in progress at the time of this report).</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RecordingStatusReport</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RecordingStatusReport</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="FileSize" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="FileSize" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Name" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Name" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="RecordingStatusCode" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="RecordingStatusCode" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="RecordingStatusReport" type="RecordingStatusReportType"/>     <xs:element name="RecordingStatusReport" type="RecordingStatusReportType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="RefreshInitType">     <xs:complexType name="RefreshInitType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>This system command supports late joiners to the C2SIM coalition of systems. It causes a fresh copy of the C2SIMInitialization message to be sent to the requesting system. Command parameters indicate that either a copy of the startup initialization (INITIALIZATION_ORIGINAL) or an updated version with latest reported positions of each ActorEntity (INITIALIZATION_LATEST_POSITIONS) be sent to the requesting system.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>This system command supports late joiners to the C2SIM coalition of systems. It causes a fresh copy of the C2SIMInitialization message to be sent to the requesting system. Command parameters indicate that either a copy of the startup initialization (INITIALIZATION_ORIGINAL) or an updated version with latest reported positions of each ActorEntity (INITIALIZATION_LATEST_POSITIONS) be sent to the requesting system.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RefreshInit</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RefreshInit</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="RefreshInitSelection" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="RefreshInitSelection" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="RefreshInit" type="RefreshInitType"/>     <xs:element name="RefreshInit" type="RefreshInitType"/> 
   <xs:simpleType name="RefreshInitSelectionType">     <xs:simpleType name="RefreshInitSelectionType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Enumeration of initialization request options for a late joiner to a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Enumeration of initialization request options for a late joiner to a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RefreshInitSelection</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RefreshInitSelection</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:restriction base="xs:string">        <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> 
         <xs:enumeration value="INITIALIZATION_LATEST_POSITIONS"/>           <xs:enumeration value="INITIALIZATION_LATEST_POSITIONS"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="INITIALIZATION_ORIGINAL"/>           <xs:enumeration value="INITIALIZATION_ORIGINAL"/> 
      </xs:restriction>        </xs:restriction> 
   </xs:simpleType>     </xs:simpleType> 
   <xs:complexType name="RelationshipType">     <xs:complexType name="RelationshipType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>This class describes a relationship to some entity. The type of relationship is defined by a subclass, which has a code property that specifies what the relationship is.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>This class describes a relationship to some entity. The type of relationship is defined by a subclass, which has a code property that specifies what the relationship is.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Relationship</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Relationship</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation>

   <xs:complexType name="ReportBodyType">     <xs:complexType name="ReportBodyType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>The structure for sending report messages.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>The structure for sending report messages.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ReportBody</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ReportBody</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:group ref="DomainMessageBodyGroup"/>           <xs:group ref="DomainMessageBodyGroup"/> 
         <xs:element ref="ReportContent" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>           <xs:element ref="ReportContent" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> 
         <xs:element ref="ReportID" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="ReportID" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="ReportingEntity" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="ReportingEntity" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="ReportBody" type="ReportBodyType"/>     <xs:element name="ReportBody" type="ReportBodyType"/> 
   <xs:group name="ReportContentGroup">     <xs:group name="ReportContentGroup"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>This is a collection class that may be used for different types of messages reporting information to other systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>This is a collection class that may be used for different types of messages reporting information to other systems.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ReportContent</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ReportContent</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="Duration" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Duration" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="TimeOfObservation" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="TimeOfObservation" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:group>     </xs:group> 
   <xs:complexType name="ReportContentType">     <xs:complexType name="ReportContentType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>This is a collection class that may be used for different types of messages reporting information to other systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>This is a collection class that may be used for different types of messages reporting information to other systems.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ReportContent</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ReportContent</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:choice>        <xs:choice> 
         <xs:element ref="ObservationReportContent"/>           <xs:element ref="ObservationReportContent"/> 
         <xs:element ref="PositionReportContent"/>           <xs:element ref="PositionReportContent"/> 
         <xs:element ref="TaskStatus"/>           <xs:element ref="TaskStatus"/> 
      </xs:choice>        </xs:choice> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:complexType name="RequestBodyType">     <xs:complexType name="RequestBodyType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>The body of a message from an actor in the domain to another actor in the domain that requests something.          <xs:documentation>The body of a message from an actor in the domain to another actor in the domain that requests something.
A request is fulfilled at the discretion of the entity to which it is directed.</xs:documentation>  A request is fulfilled at the discretion of the entity to which it is directed.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RequestBody</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RequestBody</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:group ref="DomainMessageBodyGroup"/>           <xs:group ref="DomainMessageBodyGroup"/> 
         <xs:element ref="RequestContent" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>           <xs:element ref="RequestContent" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> 
         <xs:element ref="RequestingEntity" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="RequestingEntity" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="RequestBody" type="RequestBodyType"/>     <xs:element name="RequestBody" type="RequestBodyType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="RequestContentType">     <xs:complexType name="RequestContentType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>The content of a request message in the domain. This is a parent class that has subclasses for different types of requests.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>The content of a request message in the domain. This is a parent class that has subclasses for different types of requests.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RequestContent</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#RequestContent</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:choice>        <xs:choice> 
         <xs:element ref="MIPRequestContent"/>           <xs:element ref="MIPRequestContent"/> 
         <xs:element ref="TaskRequestContent"/>           <xs:element ref="TaskRequestContent"/> 
      </xs:choice>        </xs:choice> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:complexType name="RequestPlaybackRealtimeMultipleType">     <xs:complexType name="RequestPlaybackRealtimeMultipleType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for requesting the current setting of the playbackRealtimeMultiple value indicating the multiple of simulation time to realtime currently set for recording playback in the C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for requesting the current setting of the playbackRealtimeMultiple value indicating the multiple of simulation time to realtime currently set for recording playback in the C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>

      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation>

               type="RequestPlaybackRealtimeMultipleType"/>                 type="RequestPlaybackRealtimeMultipleType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="RequestPlaybackStatusType">     <xs:complexType name="RequestPlaybackStatusType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for requesting information about the current playback of recorded C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for requesting information about the current playback of recorded C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>

         <xs:documentation>System command for requesting information about the current recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for requesting information about the current recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>

         <xs:documentation>System command for requesting the current setting of the simuationRealtimeMultiple value indicating the multiple of simulation time to realtime currently set for the simulation systems in the C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for requesting the current setting of the simuationRealtimeMultiple value indicating the multiple of simulation time to realtime currently set for the simulation systems in the C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>

   <xs:complexType name="ResourceType">     <xs:complexType name="ResourceType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>This is a resource that can be part of, transferred to, or removed from an object (Entity), but is not an entity itself; therefore it does not have a location, extent, or other physical attributes.          <xs:documentation>This is a resource that can be part of, transferred to, or removed from an object (Entity), but is not an entity itself; therefore it does not have a location, extent, or other physical attributes.
Resource can be used to manage (a) consumable material (such as ammunition and fuel); (b) equipment (such as weapons, vehicles, and communication devices); and (c) personnel. Resource can be used to manage (a) consumable material (such as ammunition and fuel); (b) equipment (such as weapons, vehicles, and communication devices); and (c) personnel.
A resource is defined by the SISO entity type of the resource, the operational quantity of the resource (available for operations), and optionnaly with required and "on hand" quantities.</xs:documentation>  A resource is defined by the SISO entity type of the resource, the operational quantity of the resource (available for operations), and optionnaly with required and "on hand" quantities.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Resource</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Resource</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="Name" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Name" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="OnHandQuantity" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="OnHandQuantity" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="OperationalQuantity" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="OperationalQuantity" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="RequiredOnHandQuantity" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="RequiredOnHandQuantity" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="SISOEntityType" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="SISOEntityType" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:complexType name="ResourcesType">     <xs:complexType name="ResourcesType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>A level of personnel, equipment, ammunition, fuel, etc. The user must compare this to the full strength of the unit.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>A level of personnel, equipment, ammunition, fuel, etc. The user must compare this to the full strength of the unit.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Resources</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Resources</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="Resource" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>           <xs:element ref="Resource" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="Resources" type="ResourcesType"/>     <xs:element name="Resources" type="ResourcesType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="ResumePlaybackType">     <xs:complexType name="ResumePlaybackType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for ordering resumption of the current playback of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording being played back is not needed here since there can be only one playback in progress at a time.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for ordering resumption of the current playback of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording being played back is not needed here since there can be only one playback in progress at a time.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ResumePlayback</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ResumePlayback</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="ResumePlayback" type="ResumePlaybackType"/>     <xs:element name="ResumePlayback" type="ResumePlaybackType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="ResumeRecordingType">     <xs:complexType name="ResumeRecordingType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for ordering resumption of recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording in progress is not needed here since there can be only one recording in progress at a time.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for ordering resumption of recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording in progress is not needed here since there can be only one recording in progress at a time.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ResumeRecording</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ResumeRecording</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="ResumeRecording" type="ResumeRecordingType"/>     <xs:element name="ResumeRecording" type="ResumeRecordingType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="ResumeScenarioType">     <xs:complexType name="ResumeScenarioType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>A system command to resume the paused execution of a scenario across a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>A system command to resume the paused execution of a scenario across a C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ResumeScenario</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ResumeScenario</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="ResumeScenario" type="ResumeScenarioType"/>     <xs:element name="ResumeScenario" type="ResumeScenarioType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="SISOEntityTypeType">     <xs:complexType name="SISOEntityTypeType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Simulation Entity Type as specified by SISO-REF-010-2016, Reference for Enumerations for Simulation Interoperability, version 27 (2019).          <xs:documentation>Simulation Entity Type as specified by SISO-REF-010-2016, Reference for Enumerations for Simulation Interoperability, version 27 (2019).
Used to define the type of an Entity for its representation and modeling in simulations.</xs:documentation>  Used to define the type of an Entity for its representation and modeling in simulations.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SISOEntityType</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SISOEntityType</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="DISCategory" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="DISCategory" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="DISCountry" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="DISCountry" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="DISDomain" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="DISDomain" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="DISExtra" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="DISExtra" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="DISKind" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="DISKind" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="DISSpecific" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="DISSpecific" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="DISSubCategory" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="DISSubCategory" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:complexType name="ScenarioSettingType">     <xs:complexType name="ScenarioSettingType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Information describing the setting of the scenario, including the date, time, physical extent of the terrain, and a version string.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Information describing the setting of the scenario, including the date, time, physical extent of the terrain, and a version string.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ScenarioSetting</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ScenarioSetting</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="DateTime" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="DateTime" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Version" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Version" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
.   <xs:simpleType name="SecurityClassificationCodeType">   
      <xs:annotation>   
         <xs:documentation>Alphabetic text descriptions used by the USA-Department of Defense to identify the level of sensitivity of information</xs:documentation>   
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SecurityClassificationCode</xs:documentation>   
      </xs:annotation>   
      <xs:restriction base="xs:string">   
         <xs:enumeration value="Confidential"/>   
         <xs:enumeration value="Secret"/>   
         <xs:enumeration value="TopSecret"/>   
         <xs:enumeration value="Unclassified"/>   
      </xs:restriction>   
   </xs:simpleType>   
   <xs:complexType name="SetPlaybackRealtimeMultipleType">     <xs:complexType name="SetPlaybackRealtimeMultipleType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for setting the playbackRealtimeMultiple value indicating the  multiple of simulation time to realtime for playback of recorded messages in the C2SIM coalition of systems.The SetPlaybackRealtimeMultiple enables a user in a C2SIM coalition to direct playback of recorded messages at a rate faster or slower than realtime. For example, a playbackRealtimeMultiple value of 2.0 directs recording playback at 2:1 simulation time to realtime (i.e., faster than realtime); a value of 0.5 directs recording playback at half realtime (i.e., slower than realtime).</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for setting the playbackRealtimeMultiple value indicating the  multiple of simulation time to realtime for playback of recorded messages in the C2SIM coalition of systems.The SetPlaybackRealtimeMultiple enables a user in a C2SIM coalition to direct playback of recorded messages at a rate faster or slower than realtime. For example, a playbackRealtimeMultiple value of 2.0 directs recording playback at 2:1 simulation time to realtime (i.e., faster than realtime); a value of 0.5 directs recording playback at half realtime (i.e., slower than realtime).</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SetPlaybackRealtimeMultiple</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SetPlaybackRealtimeMultiple</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="PlaybackRealtimeMultiple" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="PlaybackRealtimeMultiple" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="SetPlaybackRealtimeMultiple"     <xs:element name="SetPlaybackRealtimeMultiple" 
               type="SetPlaybackRealtimeMultipleType"/>                 type="SetPlaybackRealtimeMultipleType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="SetSimulationRealtimeMultipleType">     <xs:complexType name="SetSimulationRealtimeMultipleType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for setting the simuationRealtimeMultiple value indicating the  multiple of simulation time to realtime for the simulation systems in the C2SIM coalition of systems.The SetSimulationRealtimeMultiple enables a user in a C2SIM coalition to direct participating simulations to execute at a rate faster or slower than realtime. For example, a simulationRealtimeMultiple value of 2.0 directs participating simulations to operate at 2:1 simulation time to realtime (i.e., faster than realtime); a value of 0.5 directs participating simulations to operate at half realtime (i.e., slower than realtime).</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for setting the simuationRealtimeMultiple value indicating the  multiple of simulation time to realtime for the simulation systems in the C2SIM coalition of systems.The SetSimulationRealtimeMultiple enables a user in a C2SIM coalition to direct participating simulations to execute at a rate faster or slower than realtime. For example, a simulationRealtimeMultiple value of 2.0 directs participating simulations to operate at 2:1 simulation time to realtime (i.e., faster than realtime); a value of 0.5 directs participating simulations to operate at half realtime (i.e., slower than realtime).</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SetSimulationRealtimeMultiple</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SetSimulationRealtimeMultiple</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="SimulationRealtimeMultiple" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="SimulationRealtimeMultiple" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="SetSimulationRealtimeMultiple"     <xs:element name="SetSimulationRealtimeMultiple" 
               type="SetSimulationRealtimeMultipleType"/>                 type="SetSimulationRealtimeMultipleType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="ShareScenarioType">     <xs:complexType name="ShareScenarioType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Sent by a C2SIM controller to a marshalling server. When this C2SIM message is received, the marshalling server sends to all subscribed systems the C2SIM initialization message.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Sent by a C2SIM controller to a marshalling server. When this C2SIM message is received, the marshalling server sends to all subscribed systems the C2SIM initialization message.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ShareScenario</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#ShareScenario</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="ShareScenario" type="ShareScenarioType"/>     <xs:element name="ShareScenario" type="ShareScenarioType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="SimulationRealtimeMultipleReportType">     <xs:complexType name="SimulationRealtimeMultipleReportType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for reporting the current setting of the simuationRealtimeMultiple value indicating the multiple of simulation time to realtime currently set for the simulation systems in the C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for reporting the current setting of the simuationRealtimeMultiple value indicating the multiple of simulation time to realtime currently set for the simulation systems in the C2SIM coalition of systems.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SimulationRealtimeMultipleReport</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SimulationRealtimeMultipleReport</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="SimulationRealtimeMultiple" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="SimulationRealtimeMultiple" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="SimulationRealtimeMultipleReport"     <xs:element name="SimulationRealtimeMultipleReport" 
               type="SimulationRealtimeMultipleReportType"/>                 type="SimulationRealtimeMultipleReportType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="SimulationTimeType">     <xs:complexType name="SimulationTimeType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>A time measured as a time duration since the time instant of the scenario start.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>A time measured as a time duration since the time instant of the scenario start.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SimulationTime</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SimulationTime</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:group ref="TimeInstantGroup"/>           <xs:group ref="TimeInstantGroup"/> 
         <xs:element ref="DelayTimeAmount" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="DelayTimeAmount" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="SimulationTime" type="SimulationTimeType"/>     <xs:element name="SimulationTime" type="SimulationTimeType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="SpatialOffsetType">     <xs:complexType name="SpatialOffsetType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Used in a relative location specification.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Used in a relative location specification.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SpatialOffset</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SpatialOffset</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:choice>        <xs:choice> 
         <xs:element ref="CartesianOffset"/>           <xs:element ref="CartesianOffset"/> 
      </xs:choice>        </xs:choice> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:complexType name="StartPlaybackType">     <xs:complexType name="StartPlaybackType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command ordering the initiation of playback of recorded C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name refers to the name given to a recording that was previously created for later playback. The start time refers to the position in the recording where the playback is to begin. Playback is controlled by the C2SIM server sending out C2SIM messages that were previously recorded.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command ordering the initiation of playback of recorded C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name refers to the name given to a recording that was previously created for later playback. The start time refers to the position in the recording where the playback is to begin. Playback is controlled by the C2SIM server sending out C2SIM messages that were previously recorded.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StartPlayback</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StartPlayback</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="Name" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Name" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="StartTime" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="StartTime" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="StartPlayback" type="StartPlaybackType"/>     <xs:element name="StartPlayback" type="StartPlaybackType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="StartRecordingType">     <xs:complexType name="StartRecordingType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command for ordering initiation of the recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The recording is given a name in order to distinguish this recording from others that may have been created and stored for later use. Note that there can be only one recording in progress at a time in the C2SIM coalition of systems. Recording is executed by the C2SIM server recording C2SIM messages that are exchanged across systems in a C2SIM coalition.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command for ordering initiation of the recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The recording is given a name in order to distinguish this recording from others that may have been created and stored for later use. Note that there can be only one recording in progress at a time in the C2SIM coalition of systems. Recording is executed by the C2SIM server recording C2SIM messages that are exchanged across systems in a C2SIM coalition.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StartRecording</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StartRecording</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="Name" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Name" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="StartRecording" type="StartRecordingType"/>     <xs:element name="StartRecording" type="StartRecordingType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="StartScenarioType">     <xs:complexType name="StartScenarioType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>This C2SIM message is sent to all subscribed systems indicating that the simulation scenario is to begin.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>This C2SIM message is sent to all subscribed systems indicating that the simulation scenario is to begin.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StartScenario</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StartScenario</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="StartScenario" type="StartScenarioType"/>     <xs:element name="StartScenario" type="StartScenarioType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="StopPlaybackType">     <xs:complexType name="StopPlaybackType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command used to terminate (no resumption allowed) the playback of recorded C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording being played back is not needed here since there can be only one playback in progress at a time.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command used to terminate (no resumption allowed) the playback of recorded C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording being played back is not needed here since there can be only one playback in progress at a time.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StopPlayback</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StopPlayback</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="StopPlayback" type="StopPlaybackType"/>     <xs:element name="StopPlayback" type="StopPlaybackType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="StopRecordingType">     <xs:complexType name="StopRecordingType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>System command used to terminate (no resumption allowed) the recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording  is not needed here since there can be only one recording in progress at a time.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>System command used to terminate (no resumption allowed) the recording of C2SIM messages in a C2SIM coalition of systems. The name of the recording  is not needed here since there can be only one recording in progress at a time.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StopRecording</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StopRecording</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="StopRecording" type="StopRecordingType"/>     <xs:element name="StopRecording" type="StopRecordingType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="StopScenarioType">     <xs:complexType name="StopScenarioType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
.         <xs:documentation>This C2SIM message is sent to all subscribed systems indicating that the simulation should be stopped and won’t be restarted. All initialization data should be discarded, and all systems should prepare to reinitialize.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>This C2SIM message is sent to all subscribed systems indicating that the simulation should be stopped and will not be restarted. All initialization data should be discarded, and all systems should prepare to reinitialize.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StopScenario</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#StopScenario</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="StopScenario" type="StopScenarioType"/>     <xs:element name="StopScenario" type="StopScenarioType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="StrengthType">     <xs:complexType name="StrengthType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Representation of the strength of an entity expressed as a percentage of some starting value.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Representation of the strength of an entity expressed as a percentage of some starting value.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Strength</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Strength</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="StrengthPercentage" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="StrengthPercentage" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="Strength" type="StrengthType"/>     <xs:element name="Strength" type="StrengthType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="SubmitInitializationType">     <xs:complexType name="SubmitInitializationType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>Sent by a C2SIM controller. When C2SIM systems receive this C2SIM message, they should submit Object Initialization messages for object definitions they are configured to simulate. This message contains no data; it serves as a command and is not required if a preconfigured master initialization file is used.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>Sent by a C2SIM controller. When C2SIM systems receive this C2SIM message, they should submit Object Initialization messages for object definitions they are configured to simulate. This message contains no data; it serves as a command and is not required if a preconfigured master initialization file is used.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SubmitInitialization</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SubmitInitialization</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="SubmitInitialization" type="SubmitInitializationType"/>     <xs:element name="SubmitInitialization" type="SubmitInitializationType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="SystemAcknowledgementBodyType">     <xs:complexType name="SystemAcknowledgementBodyType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>An acknowledgement from one C2SIM system to another that a message was received.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>An acknowledgement from one C2SIM system to another that a message was received.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SystemAcknowledgementBody</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SystemAcknowledgementBody</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="AcknowledgeTypeCode" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="AcknowledgeTypeCode" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="SystemAcknowledgementBody" type="SystemAcknowledgementBodyType"/>     <xs:element name="SystemAcknowledgementBody" type="SystemAcknowledgementBodyType"/> 
   <xs:complexType name="SystemEntityListType">     <xs:complexType name="SystemEntityListType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>This is a listing of entities that reside within a system. The list defines what system a message should be sent to in order to get it to a given actor.  Each entity can reside on only one system. This list does not define necessarily define the complete list of entities on the given system.          <xs:documentation>This is a listing of entities that reside within a system. The list defines what system a message should be sent to in order to get it to a given actor.  Each entity can reside on only one system. This list does not define necessarily define the complete list of entities on the given system.
Systems can build a map from this and other lists to get the system from a given entity.</xs:documentation>  Systems can build a map from this and other lists to get the system from a given entity.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SystemEntityList</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SystemEntityList</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="ActorReference" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>           <xs:element ref="ActorReference" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> 
         <xs:element ref="SystemName" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="SystemName" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:complexType name="SystemMessageBodyType">     <xs:complexType name="SystemMessageBodyType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>The body of a message that is used to send coalition-level commands, requests, and reports between systems participating in the C2SIM coalition.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>The body of a message that is used to send coalition-level commands, requests, and reports between systems participating in the C2SIM coalition.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SystemMessageBody</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#SystemMessageBody</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:choice>        <xs:choice> 
         <xs:element ref="CheckpointRestore"/>           <xs:element ref="CheckpointRestore"/> 
         <xs:element ref="CheckpointSave"/>           <xs:element ref="CheckpointSave"/> 
         <xs:element ref="InitializationComplete"/>           <xs:element ref="InitializationComplete"/> 
         <xs:element ref="MagicMove"/>           <xs:element ref="MagicMove"/> 
         <xs:element ref="PausePlayback"/>           <xs:element ref="PausePlayback"/> 
         <xs:element ref="PauseRecording"/>           <xs:element ref="PauseRecording"/> 
         <xs:element ref="PauseScenario"/>           <xs:element ref="PauseScenario"/> 
         <xs:element ref="PlaybackRealtimeMultipleReport"/>           <xs:element ref="PlaybackRealtimeMultipleReport"/> 
         <xs:element ref="PlaybackStatusReport"/>           <xs:element ref="PlaybackStatusReport"/> 
         <xs:element ref="RecordingStatusReport"/>           <xs:element ref="RecordingStatusReport"/> 
         <xs:element ref="RefreshInit"/>           <xs:element ref="RefreshInit"/> 
         <xs:element ref="RequestPlaybackRealtimeMultiple"/>           <xs:element ref="RequestPlaybackRealtimeMultiple"/> 
         <xs:element ref="RequestPlaybackStatus"/>           <xs:element ref="RequestPlaybackStatus"/> 
         <xs:element ref="RequestRecordingStatus"/>           <xs:element ref="RequestRecordingStatus"/> 
         <xs:element ref="RequestSimulationRealtimeMultiple"/>           <xs:element ref="RequestSimulationRealtimeMultiple"/> 
         <xs:element ref="ResetScenario"/>           <xs:element ref="ResetScenario"/> 
         <xs:element ref="ResumePlayback"/>           <xs:element ref="ResumePlayback"/> 
         <xs:element ref="ResumeRecording"/>           <xs:element ref="ResumeRecording"/> 
         <xs:element ref="ResumeScenario"/>           <xs:element ref="ResumeScenario"/> 
         <xs:element ref="SetPlaybackRealtimeMultiple"/>           <xs:element ref="SetPlaybackRealtimeMultiple"/> 
         <xs:element ref="SetSimulationRealtimeMultiple"/>           <xs:element ref="SetSimulationRealtimeMultiple"/> 
         <xs:element ref="ShareScenario"/>           <xs:element ref="ShareScenario"/> 
         <xs:element ref="SimulationRealtimeMultipleReport"/>           <xs:element ref="SimulationRealtimeMultipleReport"/> 
         <xs:element ref="StartPlayback"/>           <xs:element ref="StartPlayback"/> 
         <xs:element ref="StartRecording"/>           <xs:element ref="StartRecording"/> 
         <xs:element ref="StartScenario"/>           <xs:element ref="StartScenario"/> 
         <xs:element ref="StopPlayback"/>           <xs:element ref="StopPlayback"/> 
         <xs:element ref="StopRecording"/>           <xs:element ref="StopRecording"/> 
         <xs:element ref="StopScenario"/>           <xs:element ref="StopScenario"/> 
         <xs:element ref="SubmitInitialization"/>           <xs:element ref="SubmitInitialization"/> 
      </xs:choice>        </xs:choice> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:element name="SystemMessageBody" type="SystemMessageBodyType"/>     <xs:element name="SystemMessageBody" type="SystemMessageBodyType"/> 
   <xs:group name="TaskGroup">     <xs:group name="TaskGroup"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>A request for an actor in the domain to perform a Task. The actor to perform the Task is indicated by the hasPerformingEntity property of the Task. An Action that takes place over time, and is performed by an Entity to change the state of the world.          <xs:documentation>A request for an actor in the domain to perform a Task. The actor to perform the Task is indicated by the hasPerformingEntity property of the Task. An Action that takes place over time, and is performed by an Entity to change the state of the world.
Must identify WHO, WHAT, WHEN and WHERE. Must identify WHO, WHAT, WHEN and WHERE.
WHO is represented by hasPerformingEntity (and hasAffectedEntity). WHO is represented by hasPerformingEntity (and hasAffectedEntity).
WHAT is represented by the hasTaskActionCode. WHAT is represented by the hasTaskActionCode.
WHEN is represented by the start time/duration/end time (2 of 3) WHEN is represented by the start time/duration/end time (2 of 3)
WHERE is represented by hasLocation and/or hasMapGraphicID reference. WHERE is represented by hasLocation and/or hasMapGraphicID reference.
WHY may be represented by hasDesiredEffect.</xs:documentation>  WHY may be represented by hasDesiredEffect.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Task</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Task</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:sequence>        <xs:sequence> 
         <xs:element ref="AffectedEntity" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>           <xs:element ref="AffectedEntity" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> 
         <xs:element ref="DesiredEffectCode" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>           <xs:element ref="DesiredEffectCode" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> 
         <xs:element ref="Duration" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="Duration" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="EndTime" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="EndTime" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="PerformingEntity" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="PerformingEntity" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="StartTime" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="StartTime" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> 
         <xs:element ref="TaskActionCode" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/>           <xs:element ref="TaskActionCode" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> 
      </xs:sequence>        </xs:sequence> 
   </xs:group>     </xs:group> 
   <xs:complexType name="TaskType">     <xs:complexType name="TaskType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>A request for an actor in the domain to perform a Task. The actor to perform the Task is indicated by the hasPerformingEntity property of the Task. An Action that takes place over time, and is performed by an Entity to change the state of the world.          <xs:documentation>A request for an actor in the domain to perform a Task. The actor to perform the Task is indicated by the hasPerformingEntity property of the Task. An Action that takes place over time, and is performed by an Entity to change the state of the world.
Must identify WHO, WHAT, WHEN and WHERE. Must identify WHO, WHAT, WHEN and WHERE.
WHO is represented by hasPerformingEntity (and hasAffectedEntity). WHO is represented by hasPerformingEntity (and hasAffectedEntity).
WHAT is represented by the hasTaskActionCode. WHAT is represented by the hasTaskActionCode.
WHEN is represented by the start time/duration/end time (2 of 3) WHEN is represented by the start time/duration/end time (2 of 3)
WHERE is represented by hasLocation and/or hasMapGraphicID reference. WHERE is represented by hasLocation and/or hasMapGraphicID reference.
WHY may be represented by hasDesiredEffect.</xs:documentation>  WHY may be represented by hasDesiredEffect.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Task</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#Task</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:choice>        <xs:choice> 
         <xs:element ref="ManeuverWarfareTask"/>           <xs:element ref="ManeuverWarfareTask"/> 
      </xs:choice>        </xs:choice> 
   </xs:complexType>     </xs:complexType> 
   <xs:simpleType name="TaskActionCodeType">     <xs:simpleType name="TaskActionCodeType"> 
      <xs:annotation>        <xs:annotation> 
         <xs:documentation>The activity to be performed in the task, e.g. Move, Observe, Assist.</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>The activity to be performed in the task, e.g. Move, Observe, Assist.</xs:documentation> 
         <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#TaskActionCode</xs:documentation>           <xs:documentation>http://www.sisostds.org/ontologies/C2SIM#TaskActionCode</xs:documentation> 
      </xs:annotation>        </xs:annotation> 
      <xs:restriction base="xs:string">        <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AssistOtherUnit"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AssistOtherUnit"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="HoldInPlace"/>           <xs:enumeration value="HoldInPlace"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="MoveToLocation"/>           <xs:enumeration value="MoveToLocation"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="Observe"/>           <xs:enumeration value="Observe"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="OrientToLocation"/>           <xs:enumeration value="OrientToLocation"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="ReportPosition"/>           <xs:enumeration value="ReportPosition"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="UseCapability"/>           <xs:enumeration value="UseCapability"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="ACQUIR"/>           <xs:enumeration value="ACQUIR"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="ADVANC"/>           <xs:enumeration value="ADVANC"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AEREVA"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AEREVA"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AERRFL"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AERRFL"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AEW"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AEW"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AEWCON"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AEWCON"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AIRDEF"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AIRDEF"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AIRLND"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AIRLND"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AIRSUP"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AIRSUP"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AIRSWP"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AIRSWP"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AMBUSH"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AMBUSH"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AMPH"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AMPH"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="AMPHWF"/>           <xs:enumeration value="AMPHWF"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="ANALYS"/>           <xs:enumeration value="ANALYS"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="ANARWF"/>           <xs:enumeration value="ANARWF"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="ANSBWF"/>           <xs:enumeration value="ANSBWF"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="ANSFWF"/>           <xs:enumeration value="ANSFWF"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="ANTARM"/>           <xs:enumeration value="ANTARM"/> 
         <xs:enumeration value="ARASLT"/>           <xs:enumeration value="ARASLT"/>
